bird.name: Abd al-Kuri sparrow
bird.summary: The Abd al-Kuri sparrow (Passer hemileucus) is a passerine bird endemic to the small island of Abd al Kuri. The sparrows are located primar…

relations.subject: Abd al-Kuri sparrow
relations.evidence: thumb|Female (Above) and Male (Below) illustrated by Henrik Grønvold The Abd al-Kuri sparrow is threatened by locals who are hunting them for food; it is also subject to natural disasters such as cyclones. Due to the sparrows' small population size, hunting, largely in the Autumn season, is a major threat to this species. There are only four passerines breeding on the island of Abd al-Kuri, so harvesting causes significant impacts on the sparrows' population
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。

relations.object_summary: 种群规模过小导致遗传多样性下降和脆弱性上升。
